name: Circle of the Sea Spells
description: When you reach a Druid level specified in the Circle of the Sea Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. Circle of the Sea Spells table: 3rd – Fog Cloud, Gust of Wind, Ray of Frost, Shatter, Thunderwave; 5th – Lightning Bolt, Water Breathing; 7th – Control Water, Ice Storm; 9th – Conjure Elemental, Hold Monster.
